H=e(f)local y=function()return A(T,{},f,H)end return y end,function(T,f)local H=e(f)local y=function(y,z)return A(T,{y,z},f,H)end return y end,function(T)F[T]=F[T]-(-356032-(-356033))if F[T]==566017+-566017 then F[T],k[T]=nil,nil end end return(x(902503+7985639,{}))(H(S))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[f(543572+-543892)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
